channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BHARATCOAL] Bharat Coking Coal Ltd Updates Corporate Identification Number on MCA Portal Post Listing on Stock Exchanges
item.description:
Bharat Coking Coal Ltd (BCCL) has updated its Corporate Identification Number (CIN) and status on the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) portal following the listing of its equity shares on the Stock Exchanges. The new CIN is L10101JH1972GOI000918. This change is reflected in the company's Master Data from the MCA portal. BCCL is a Union government company with an authorized capital of Rs 51,00,00,00,000 and a paid-up capital of Rs 46,57,00,00,000 as of 31/03/2025. The company's last annual general meeting was held on 25/07/2025.

  • Bharat Coking Coal Ltd updates its Corporate Identification Number (CIN) to L10101JH1972GOI000918.
  • The update was made following the listing of the company's equity shares on the Stock Exchanges.
  • The updated CIN is reflected in the company's Master Data from the MCA portal.
  • BCCL is a Union government company with an authorized capital of Rs 51,00,00,00,000 and a paid-up capital of Rs 46,57,00,00,000 as of 31/03/2025.
  • BCCL's last annual general meeting was held on 25/07/2025.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bharat Coking Coal Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [RUSHIL] Rushil Decor Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Rushil Decor Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window under SEBI (Prohibition Of Insider Trading) Regulation for the Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Year ended 31st March, 2026. The trading window for all insiders, including Designated Persons, will be closed from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026. The window will reopen 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board Meeting to consider the Audited Financial Result for the Fourth Quarter ended 31st March, 2026.

  • Rushil Decor Ltd announces closure of trading window under SEBI regulations
  • Trading window to remain closed from 1st April, 2026
  • Window to reopen 48 hours after the Board Meeting
  • Board Meeting to consider Audited Financial Result for the Quarter and Year ended 31st March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RUSHIL DECOR LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ASTRAZEN] AstraZeneca Pharma India Ltd: Non-Executive Director, Jesús Diaz-Ropero Esteso, Resigns Due to Transition in Responsibilities
item.description:
AstraZeneca Pharma India Ltd has announced the resignation of its Non-Executive Director, Jesús Diaz-Ropero Esteso, due to a transition from his current responsibilities. The resignation is effective immediately. Mr. Esteso also resigned from all the Board Committees he served on. The company has complied with the necessary disclosure requirements as per the SEBI regulations.

  • Jesús Diaz-Ropero Esteso has resigned from his position as Non-Executive Director of AstraZeneca Pharma India Ltd due to a transition in responsibilities.
  • The resignation is effective immediately.
  • Mr. Esteso also resigned from all the Board Committees he served on.
  • The company has complied with the necessary disclosure requirements as per the SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASTRAZENECA PHARMA INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHANKARA] Ballygunge Family Trust Acquires Shares of Shankara Building Products Ltd
item.description:
The Ballygunge Family Trust has disclosed the acquisition of shares of Shankara Building Products Limited under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition was made through the open market. Before the acquisition, the Trust held 2.84% of the total shares/voting capital. Post-acquisition, the Trust holds 3.00% of the total shares/voting capital of the company. The total equity share capital of the company remains unchanged at Rs. 24,24,93,260/-.

  • Ballygunge Family Trust acquires shares of Shankara Building Products Ltd
  • Acquisition made through open market
  • Pre-acquisition holding: 2.84%
  • Post-acquisition holding: 3.00%
  • Total equity share capital of the company remains unchanged

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shankara Building Products Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HFIL] Himalaya Food International Ltd Closes Trading Window Under SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Himalaya Food International Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations for the quarter ended March 31ST, 2026. This closure is in accordance with the SEBI regulations, BSE circular no. LIST/COMP/01/2019-20 dated April 02, 2019, and the company's 'Code of conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading and Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information (UPSI)'. The trading window will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter ended March 31ST, 2026. All designated persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to enter into any transactions involving dealing/trading in shares of the company during this period. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration of the audited Financial Results will be informed in due course.

  • Himalaya Food International Ltd closes trading window under SEBI regulations
  • Closure is in accordance with SEBI regulations, BSE circular, and the company's code of conduct
  • Trading window to remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives advised not to enter into any transactions during the closure
  • Date of Board Meeting for consideration of audited Financial Results to be informed later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Himalaya Food International Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [QUADRANT] Quadrant Televentures Ltd. Postpones 7th Committee of Creditors Meeting to March 23, 2026
item.description:
Quadrant Televentures Ltd. has announced the postponement of the 7th meeting of its Committee of Creditors. The meeting, originally scheduled for Friday, March 20, 2026, has been rescheduled to Monday, March 23, 2026, following a request from a member of the Committee of Creditors. This announcement serves as an update for stakeholders and records.

  • Quadrant Televentures Ltd. postpones 7th Committee of Creditors meeting
  • Meeting rescheduled from March 20, 2026 to March 23, 2026
  • Postponement due to request from Committee of Creditors member

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Quadrant Televentures Limited-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZEELEARN] NCLT Dismisses Insolvency Petition Against Zee Learn Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zee Learn Ltd has announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has dismissed a petition filed by Axis Bank Limited under Section 7 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. The petition, which was filed for the initiation of Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) against the company, was withdrawn and the matter was listed as a pre-admission matter. Upon hearing the parties on March 19, 2026, the Hon’ble NCLT, Mumbai Bench, dismissed the petition. The company has been informed about this development via email dated March 20, 2026.

  • NCLT dismisses insolvency petition against Zee Learn Ltd
  • Petition filed by Axis Bank Limited under Section 7 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016
  • Petition was withdrawn and dismissed by NCLT, Mumbai Bench
  • Company informed about the dismissal via email dated March 20, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZEE LEARN LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [ORIBEVER] Independent Director, Sri Vivek Vardhan Agarwalla, to Step Down from Orient Beverages Ltd by March 2026
item.description:
Orient Beverages Ltd has announced the completion of the tenure of Sri Vivek Vardhan Agarwalla as an Independent Director. His second term of five years will end on March 21, 2026, after which he will cease to be an Independent Director of the company. This announcement is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Reg. 2015 and SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-1/P/CIR/2023/123 dated July 13, 2023.

  • Sri Vivek Vardhan Agarwalla's second term as Independent Director ends on March 21, 2026.
  • He will cease to be an Independent Director of the company from the end of the day on March 21, 2026.
  • This announcement is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Reg. 2015 and SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-1/P/CIR/2023/123 dated July 13, 2023.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORIENT BEVERAGES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GPIL] Godawari Power and Ispat Acquires 100% Stake in Godawari New Energy, No Further Investment Required
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd has acquired 100% stake in its wholly owned subsidiary, Godawari New Energy Private Ltd, through the conversion of preference shares into equity shares. The conversion resulted in the allotment of 19,89,00,000 equity shares of Rs 10/- each at par, without any further infusion of funds into GNEPL. GNEPL is in the process of setting up a 20 Gwh Battery Energy Storage System Plant in First Phase and has its registered office at Raipur, Chhattisgarh.

  • Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd has acquired 100% stake in Godawari New Energy Private Ltd
  • The acquisition was done through the conversion of preference shares into equity shares
  • No further infusion of funds into GNEPL was required
  • GNEPL is setting up a 20 Gwh Battery Energy Storage System Plant in First Phase
  • GNEPL is a wholly owned subsidiary of GPIL

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GODAWARI POWER & ISPAT LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BAYERCROP] Bayer CropScience Ltd Receives ESG Rating of '67.1' from SES ESG Research
item.description:
Bayer CropScience Ltd has been assigned an ESG Rating of '67.1' by SES ESG Research Private Limited. This rating is based on the company's public disclosures on Environmental, Social and Governance parameters at the standalone level and other information available in the public domain. The company has not engaged SES ESG Research Private Limited for ESG Ratings, and they have independently prepared the report.

  • Bayer CropScience Ltd receives ESG Rating of '67.1' from SES ESG Research
  • Rating is based on public disclosures on Environmental, Social and Governance parameters
  • Company has not engaged SES ESG Research Private Limited for ESG Ratings
  • SES ESG Research has independently prepared the report based on data available in public domain

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAYER CROPSCIENCE LTD. | Category: Monthly Update
